name: unified-ai-intelligence-dashboard
description: Unified campus dashboard powered by independent MCP servers and a local Ollama model.

scripts.predev: npm run build -w @campus/shared && npm run build -w @campus/db && npm run build -w @campus/mcp-common
scripts.dev: concurrently -n library,cafeteria,events,academics,api,web -c green,magenta,cyan,yellow,blue,white "DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env npm run dev -w @campus/library-mcp" "DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env npm run dev -w @campus/cafeteria-mcp" "DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env npm run dev -w @campus/events-mcp" "DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env npm run dev -w @campus/academics-mcp" "DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=../../.env npm run dev -w @campus/api" "npm run dev -w @campus/web"
